Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses By Defendant City And County Of San Francisco To Requests For Admission, Set One, Form Interrogatories, Set One, And Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One, And To Compel Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Jun-01-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Adrian Driscol, Esq. for Plaintiff, Michelle Walker,
Sabriina Berdux, Esq. for Defendant, City & County of San Francisco
Maria A. Torrenao, Court reporter, CSR #8600

Defendant CCSF contests the Court's tentative ruling. Argument is held. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MICHELE WALKER'S Motion To Compel Further Responses By Defendant City And County Of San Francisco To Requests For Admission, Set One, Form Interrogatories, Set One, And Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One, And To Compel Production Of Documents

The report and recommendation of the judge pro tem is adopted. Plaintiff's motion to compel further responses is granted as set forth in the report and recommendation.

Court further states that with respect to the protective order, if the parties reach agreement on a stipulated protective order parties may submit the [proposed] protective order by way of an ex parte application.

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/EPS)
